message:
feat(recommend): Wire up ms recommend subcommand for stats/history/tune

Add the recommend command infrastructure:
- Add pub mod recommend to commands/mod.rs
- Add Commands::Recommend variant to CLI enum
- Wire up command dispatch in run() function
- Add missing ContextualBandit methods:
  - total_recommendations(), total_updates(), skill_count() getters
  - config_summary() for JSON config export
  - get_all_skill_stats() for per-skill statistics
  - set_exploration_rate(), set_learning_rate() setters
- Add SkillStats struct for skill-level statistics

Commands:
- ms recommend stats: View recommendation engine statistics
- ms recommend history: View recommendation history
- ms recommend tune: Adjust weights and parameters

Closes meta_skill-kat6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
